# FastMCP Runtime

FastMCP Runtime is a hosted remote MCP for hosted MCP server.

Website: https://fastmcpruntime.clauxel.com/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: hosted MCP server
Type: MCP
Default plan: team
MCP endpoint: https://fastmcpruntime.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://fastmcpruntime.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.fastmcpruntime/fastmcpruntime-mcp
Tools: runtime_health_check, tool_schema_list, fastmcp_call_proxy, usage_receipt_lookup

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
